document.title: Beyond Rule-Based Workflows: An Information-Flow-Orchestrated Multi-Agents Paradigm via Agent-to-Agent Communication from CORAL
document.content: A multi-agent system uses information-flow orchestration and agent-to-agent communication instead of fixed rule-based workflows.

document.title: Spec Kit Agents: Context-Grounded Agentic Workflows
document.content: Spec Kit Agents describes context-grounded multi-agent workflows for software development with validation hooks.

document.title: ClawMark: A Living-World Benchmark for Multi-Turn, Multi-Day, Multimodal Coworker Agents
document.content: A benchmark evaluates language-model coworker agents over multi-day workflows and changing environment states.

document.title: Claw-Eval-Live: A Live Agent Benchmark for Evolving Real-World Workflows
document.content: A live benchmark evaluates workflow agents against evolving real-world task demands and execution logs.

document.title: Rethinking the Value of Multi-Agent Workflow: A Strong Single Agent Baseline
document.content: The paper compares multi-agent workflows with a strong single-agent baseline and analyzes efficiency tradeoffs.

document.title: Beyond RAG for Agent Memory: Retrieval by Decoupling and Aggregation
document.content: The paper studies retrieval for agent memory, where dialogue streams differ from ordinary heterogeneous RAG corpora.

document.title: MASFactory: A Graph-centric Framework for Orchestrating LLM-Based Multi-Agent Systems with Vibe Graphing
document.content: A graph-centric framework compiles natural-language intent into executable multi-agent workflows.

document.title: Memory for Autonomous LLM Agents: Mechanisms, Evaluation, and Emerging Frontiers
document.content: A survey covers memory mechanisms, evaluation, and emerging directions for autonomous LLM agents.
document.summary: Survey of memory for autonomous agents.

document.title: Multi-User Large Language Model Agents
document.content: The paper studies agents that must coordinate among multiple users with conflicting objectives and privacy constraints.

document.title: AgentVista: Evaluating Multimodal Agents in Ultra-Challenging Realistic Visual Scenarios
document.content: A benchmark evaluates multimodal agents that perform long-horizon tool interactions across realistic scenarios.

document.title: AgentConductor: Topology Evolution for Multi-Agent Competition-Level Code Generation
document.content: The method optimizes multi-agent topologies for competition-level code generation through an LLM-based orchestrator.

document.title: SoK: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG): Taxonomy, Architectures, Evaluation, and Research Directions
document.content: Agentic RAG is framed as sequential decision-making with iterative retrieval, memory, and reliability concerns.
document.summary: Taxonomy and evaluation of Agentic RAG.

document.title: PixelDiT: Pixel Diffusion Transformers for Image Generation
document.content: A pixel-space diffusion transformer improves image and text-to-image generation without a pretrained autoencoder.

document.title: StructDiff: A Structure-Preserving and Spatially Controllable Diffusion Model for Single-Image Generation
document.content: A single-scale diffusion model preserves structural layout for controllable single-image generation.

document.title: One-step Latent-free Image Generation with Pixel Mean Flows
document.content: Pixel MeanFlow introduces one-step latent-free image generation at multiple ImageNet resolutions.

document.title: UltraImage: Rethinking Resolution Extrapolation in Image Diffusion Transformers
document.content: The framework improves high-resolution image generation by addressing repetition and quality degradation.

document.title: Nucleus-Image: Sparse MoE for Image Generation
document.content: A sparse mixture-of-experts diffusion transformer improves text-to-image generation efficiency and quality.

document.title: DreamLite: A Lightweight On-Device Unified Model for Image Generation and Editing
document.content: A compact on-device diffusion model supports text-to-image generation and text-guided editing.
document.summary: On-device image generation and editing model.

document.title: Creative Image Generation with Diffusion Model
document.content: The method drives diffusion models toward low-probability image regions to produce more creative visual outputs.

document.title: DiffiT: Diffusion Vision Transformers for Image Generation
document.content: A diffusion model with vision transformers improves image generation using hierarchical architecture and time-dependent attention.
document.summary: Vision transformer architecture for image diffusion.

document.title: SSDD: Single-Step Diffusion Decoder for Efficient Image Tokenization
document.content: A single-step diffusion decoder improves reconstruction quality and sampling speed for image tokenization.

document.title: VibeVoice ASR
document.content: An automatic speech recognition model processes long audio using acoustic and semantic tokenizers with a language decoder.

document.title: Cohere Transcribe 03 2026 automatic speech recognition model
document.content: A model listing highlights automatic speech recognition systems for audio transcription workloads.

document.title: Autoregressive Model Beats Diffusion: Llama for Scalable Image Generation
document.content: LlamaGen applies next-token prediction to visual generation and reports image generation performance.
